title: Health Canada: Documents incorporated by reference - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada's Incorporation by Reference Inventory
Health Canada's Inventory of Documents Incorporated by Reference is a list of all documents incorporated by reference into regulations that Health Canada administers. This inventory is available on Health Canada's website alongside it's policy, accessible from the Health Canada Acts and Regulations webpage and provides hyperlinks to the incorporated documents themselves or provides custodian contact information that will direct stakeholders to where the incorporated documents can be obtained.
To find a document incorporated by reference into regulations under the following enabling authorities use the search function or sort using the one of the drop-down boxes in the inventory table:
- Assisted Human Reproduction Act
- Canada Consumer Product Safety Act
- Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999
- Controlled Drugs and Substances Act
- Hazardous Products Act
- Pest Control Products Act
- Tobacco and Vaping Product Act
- Statutory Instrument Act
